body:
## Summary
- Refresh `site/asset-manifest.json` from the current `site/` directory.
- Wire `node scripts/update-site-asset-manifest.js --check` into `test:static-site-asset-references` so stale committed fingerprints fail the normal static-site gate.
- Update the static reference test to match the current shipped `signin.js` asset contract: local references must exist and be present in the manifest.

## Verification
- `node scripts/update-site-asset-manifest.js --check`
- `npm run test:static-site-asset-references`
- `node --test scripts/check-live-site.test.js --test-name-pattern "asset manifest"`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:build-config`
- `/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin/prettier --check package.json scripts/static-site-asset-references.test.js site/asset-manifest.json`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: release: gate static site asset manifest freshness
